title: 数鸭子
meaning: 通过数鸭子的趣味互动，帮助0-6岁婴幼儿建立初步的数字概念（1-10），培养观察力与节奏感，同时传递亲近自然、快乐成长的积极情感。

scenes.title: 桥下流水
scenes.description: 阳光明媚的午后，清澈的小河缓缓流淌，一座古朴的石拱桥横跨其上。岸边绿树成荫，几朵小花在风中摇曳，营造出宁静祥和的氛围。
scenes.prompt: A cute little boy wearing a red cap and blue overalls, big expressive eyes, round face. A group of fluffy white ducklings with orange beaks and feet, varying slightly in size to show growth., A gentle river flowing under a stone arch bridge, lush green trees on the bank, small colorful flowers, bright sunny day, sky blue background, bright cartoon style, vibrant colors, rounded shapes, infant-friendly art., Wide shot showing the bridge and river, leading lines towards the center., Bright cartoon style, vibrant colors, soft rounded edges, high contrast but gentle palette, suitable for infants, 2D vector illustration style with clean lines.
scenes.compositionHint: Wide shot showing the bridge and river, leading lines towards the center.

scenes.title: 游过一群鸭
scenes.description: 一群毛茸茸的白色小鸭子排成一列，扑腾着翅膀在水中欢快地游过。它们表情开心，眼神灵动，水花溅起可爱的涟漪。
scenes.prompt: A cute little boy wearing a red cap and blue overalls, big expressive eyes, round face. A group of fluffy white ducklings with orange beaks and feet, varying slightly in size to show growth., A line of fluffy white ducklings swimming happily in the river, splashing water drops, cheerful expressions, bright orange beaks and feet, water ripples, bright cartoon style, vibrant colors, cute and round., Horizontal composition following the line of ducks., Bright cartoon style, vibrant colors, soft rounded edges, high contrast but gentle palette, suitable for infants, 2D vector illustration style with clean lines.
scenes.compositionHint: Horizontal composition following the line of ducks.

scenes.title: 小孩数鸭
scenes.description: 穿着背带裤的小男孩站在桥头，手指着水中的鸭子，张大嘴巴正在认真地数数。他的表情专注又好奇，周围有几只鸭子好奇地看向他。
scenes.prompt: A cute little boy wearing a red cap and blue overalls, big expressive eyes, round face. A group of fluffy white ducklings with orange beaks and feet, varying slightly in size to show growth., A cute boy in blue overalls and red cap standing on the bridge, pointing fingers at ducks, mouth open as if counting, curious and focused expression, looking down at the water, bright cartoon style, vibrant colors, soft lighting., Medium shot focusing on the boy's interaction with the scene., Bright cartoon style, vibrant colors, soft rounded edges, high contrast but gentle palette, suitable for infants, 2D vector illustration style with clean lines.
scenes.compositionHint: Medium shot focusing on the boy's interaction with the scene.
scenes.narration:
快来快来数一数
二四六七八

scenes.title: 嘎嘎真热闹
scenes.description: 镜头拉近，小鸭子们似乎听到了夸奖，兴奋地围在小男孩脚边，歪着头叫唤。它们的表情非常生动，有的张嘴大笑，有的眨着眼睛，充满童趣。
scenes.prompt: A cute little boy wearing a red cap and blue overalls, big expressive eyes, round face. A group of fluffy white ducklings with orange beaks and feet, varying slightly in size to show growth., Close up of ducklings surrounding the boy's feet, quacking happily, tilted heads, big happy mouths, winking eyes, playful atmosphere, bright cartoon style, vibrant colors, detailed cute expressions., Low angle shot from the ducklings' perspective looking up at the boy., Bright cartoon style, vibrant colors, soft rounded edges, high contrast but gentle palette, suitable for infants, 2D vector illustration style with clean lines.

scenes.narration:
嘎嘎嘎嘎嘎嘎
真呀真多呀

scenes.title: 数不清到底多少只
scenes.description: 更多的鸭子加入了队伍，画面变得拥挤而热闹。小男孩挠挠头，露出困惑又可爱的笑容，表示数量太多数不清了。背景中满是白色的鸭群。
scenes.prompt: A cute little boy wearing a red cap and blue overalls, big expressive eyes, round face. A group of fluffy white ducklings with orange beaks and feet, varying slightly in size to show growth., Many many ducklings filling the screen, the boy scratching his head with a confused but cute smile, overwhelmed by the number of ducks, chaotic but joyful scene, bright cartoon style, vibrant colors, high energy., Busy composition with many characters, focus on the boy's reaction., Bright cartoon style, vibrant colors, soft rounded edges, high contrast but gentle palette, suitable for infants, 2D vector illustration style with clean lines.
scenes.compositionHint: Busy composition with many characters, focus on the boy's reaction.

scenes.title: 一二三四五六七
scenes.description: 画面切换回清晰的队列，鸭子们重新排好队，小男孩一边拍手一边大声数数。每个数字对应一只突出的鸭子，视觉上强调数字的顺序。
scenes.prompt: A cute little boy wearing a red cap and blue overalls, big expressive eyes, round face. A group of fluffy white ducklings with orange beaks and feet, varying slightly in size to show growth., Ducklings lined up neatly in a row, boy clapping hands and counting, each duck highlighted for clarity, rhythmic and orderly, bright cartoon style, vibrant colors, educational visual aid., Sequential arrangement of ducks, clear visual grouping., Bright cartoon style, vibrant colors, soft rounded edges, high contrast but gentle palette, suitable for infants, 2D vector illustration style with clean lines.

scenes.title: 六七八九十
scenes.description: 小男孩和所有的鸭子一起面向观众，张开双臂欢呼。阳光洒在他们身上，画面温暖而圆满，象征着学习的快乐和人与自然的和谐。
